form.formComment: Returns after five-and-a-half months in the paddock. Finished off last campaign when well beaten into eighth behind Carramar Olam at this track over 1609m in a NR up to 57 on October 30 at $10. Readied with a trial win and gets the ace draw.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Returns after five-and-a-half months in the paddock. Finished off last campaign when well beaten into eighth behind Carramar Olam at this track over 1609m in a NR up to 57 on October 30 at $10. Readied with a trial win and gets the ace draw.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced roughly for a short distance rounding the turn after the start.

form.formComment: First up. At the last run he was driven from back in the field when 5th (Sr4) over 1609m after being wide early at this track, at the bell was 10th-18.5m 2WWC beaten 7 m by Im Lord Tommy (1:58.20) in NR up to 48 on December 11 at $3.60. Among the chances.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last start, 9th (Fr2) over 1609m at Newcastle beaten 30 m by Spunkys Gotsecrets (1:55.20) in NR up to 58 on April 2 at $41. Before that surrendered the lead and finished 5th (Fr4) over 1609m after showing early pace at Newcastle, at the bell was 3rd-4.38 beaten 8 m by Rockin Bull (1:53.80) in 4yo+ NR up to 55 on March 19 at $12. Better placed and draws well.

Better placed and draws well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Commenced a three wide run without cover leaving the 800m point.

form.formComment: Last start solid effort when 2nd (Fr4) over 1760m after showing early speed at Narrabri, at the bell was leading 1.6 beaten 4 m by Annie Crocker (2:08.30) in NR up to 50 on April 12 at $5. Two runs back won by 2 m as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr2) at this track (1:57.10) beating Truthbetold in NR 45 to 48 on March 26 at $3.70 at the bell was leading 9.48. Likely to measure up again.

Likely to measure up again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Pulled hard during the early and middle stages.
Slow to score up and out of position at the start.
Broke stride free of any external factors passing the 700m and lost ground.

form.formComment: Last start by 4 m as favourite (Sr3) at Narrabri (2:08.30) beating Lachies Ideal in NR up to 50 on April 12 at $3.40 at the bell was 2nd-1.6. Chance of back-to-back wins.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start by 4 m as favourite (Sr3) at Narrabri (2:08.30) beating Lachies Ideal in NR up to 50 on April 12 at $3.40 at the bell was 2nd-1.6. Chance of back-to-back wins.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Unable to be driven into position at the start and slow away.

form.formComment: Comes here second-up after a week-and-a-half. Lacklustre first-up performance when 9th (Sr1) over 1609m at Newcastle, at the bell was 6th-12.49 beaten 17 m by Bring Your Best (1:54.70) in NR 44 to 50 on April 6 at $41. May need more racing.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr1) over 2160m after showing early pace at Narrabri, beaten 16 m by Arnies Army (2:39.10) in NR up to 70 on April 5 at $3.90. Before that, a game effort despite getting well back, when 2nd (Fr6) over 1980m at this track, at the bell was 9th-21.58 beaten 4.5 m by Escalera (2:26.80) in NR up to 53 on March 26 at $6.50. One of the chances.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Pulled hard during the early and middle stages.
Hung in under pressure the run to the finish.

form.formComment: Capable of better than we have seen lately. Last start 5th (Fr4) over 2030m at Newcastle, at the bell was 2nd-4.8 beaten 18 m by Quickshift Girl (2:27.70) in NR up to 55 M on April 2 at $2.15. The start before 9th (Sr4) over 1980m at this track, at the bell was 10th-21.99 beaten 18 m by Escalera (2:26.80) in NR up to 53 on March 26 at $31. Major player with even luck.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hampered shortly after the start when attempting to avoid Lockitineddy.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 8th (Fr1) over 1609m after showing early pace at Newcastle, beaten 25 m by Spunkys Gotsecrets (1:55.20) in NR up to 58 on April 2 at $71. Showed ability the outing before when he won by 2.25 m as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr6) at this track (2:28.10) beating Cinnamon in 0-1 WIN on March 26 at $2.60 at the bell was leading 1.34. Place best.
